dialogos.texto_en: (This is the place she specified.\n Somewhere around here%p-2;――%p;)
(...Found her!)
I came to see you, Nino.
(...Hm?\n It is Nino, isn't it?)
There's something I want to tell you, Fu-kun.
What is it?
(So it is Nino.\n For a moment, I thought it might be someone else%p-2;――%p;)
(What the?\n An impact to my cheek...)
(Could it be a slap?\n In other words...she rejected me?\n Nino no longer has feelings for me?)
N-Nino.\nI%p-2;――
It's noisy around here, isn't it?\nLet's change location.
...R-right.
...Is this place okay?
Hey, Nino, what's going on?\nIf you're rejecting my confession,\nat least tell me the reason!
It's not that.
Then%p-2;――
I said I have something to tell you.\nJust stay silent and listen until the end.
...Got it.\nLet's hear it.
You're cruel, Fu-kun.
Saying things like 'I won't choose anyone' and\n'it's a waste of time.' It was as if you were testing\nour feelings, and now you're giving an answer again?
You've been playing with our feelings\nfor the past six months.\nYou're really selfish.
Well, I didn't mean it that way%p-2;――
Shut up and listen!!
...Yes.
(That's right.\n I knew well enough that I was being too selfish.)
(But still, I confessed with the naive expectation\n that she would understand.\n It's only natural for her to be angry...)
Regardless of your thoughts, Fu-kun...\nEven so, the fact that you said you would\ngive me an answer made me happy%p-2;――
It means that what I've been doing\nwasn't in vain...
But maybe all this time, we've just been selfishly\nfalling in love with you, Fu-kun,\nand imposing ourselves on you%p-2;――
I understand that, but still! Toying with our feelings\nlike that, after stirring us up,\njust giving an answer is still unfair...
Nino...
Ah, my GOSH!\nI've lost track of what I wanted to say, but anyway,\nthat slap just now was about that!
I'm sorry.\nIt's because I kept delaying my answer\nthat I've made you suffer for so long.
To forgive me with just one slap,\nyou're honestly too kind.
If there's something you want to say to me,\nsay it all. Criticism or whatnot, I'll accept it%p-2;――
I love you.
I said it that night, didn't I?\nMy feelings haven't changed.
Even now, it's the same.\nMy feelings haven't changed even once.
I love you, Fu-kun.
...Nino.
Teehee!\nI don't have anything else to say.
So, that's everything.\n...And?
I love you, too.\nNino.
...I finally got to hear it.
Yeah. I finally said it.
